testcase.name: test_chat_long_complex_premium_model

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_core.py:211: in test_chat_long_complex_premium_model assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_stats

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Owner login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_ai_core.py:76: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Owner login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Owner login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
